name: Widow Pension (IGNWPS)
full_name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
target_description: Widows from BPL households aged 40 years and above
data_source: NSAP IGNWPS scheme details from nsap.nic.in and myscheme.gov.in

rules.description: Applicant must be at least 40 years old
Applicant must be from a BPL household
rules.ambiguity_note: BPL status based on SECC/ration card — stale data may exclude genuinely poor applicants

rules.description: Must have Aadhaar for identity and DBT payment
Pension is permanently revoked on remarriage or divorce per central IGNWPS guidelines — applicant must remain widowed
rules.ambiguity_note: Remarriage definitively revokes the widow pension at central level. Divorced applicants are also ineligible as they are not widows.

rules.description: Applicant must not already be receiving a government pension
rules.ambiguity_note: Cannot receive IGNWPS if already receiving IGNOAPS, IGNDPS, or any other NSAP pension

name_hindi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय विधवा पेंशन योजना

application_offices.find_instruction: Your village Gram Panchayat. Ask your Sarpanch for help.
Block Development Office (BDO) in your block or tehsil

full_name_hindi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय विधवा पेंशन योजना
description: Monthly pension for BPL widows aged 40–79 years. Central contribution is ₹300/month. States add varying amounts — total pension ranges from ₹300 to over ₹2,000/month. At age 80, the widow transitions to IGNOAPS (old age pension). Paid directly to bank account.
description_hindi: 40 से 79 वर्ष की BPL विधवा महिलाओं को हर महीने पेंशन मिलती है। केंद्र सरकार ₹300/माह देती है, राज्य सरकार अपनी राशि जोड़ती है। 80 वर्ष की आयु पर IGNOAPS (वृद्धावस्था पेंशन) में तब्दील हो जाती है। पेंशन सीधे बैंक खाते में आती है।
benefit_summary_hindi: ₹300/माह (केंद्र) + राज्य टॉप-अप, 40–79 वर्ष विधवा महिलाओं के लिए
